sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65551" key="megarto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεγαρ-τός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n65551.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">envious</tr_>, Id.</sense> </entryFree>
